headline.text: L1 Sollich 2 fought Cavanna 4 accumulation all day — *still jamming* at window close — while L3 ML4 mold jams and chain sync remain unresolved after *12 hours*.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 Sollich 2 had a rough startup with Cavanna issues and wrong seal carriers, then ran above attainment at 1300 ppm by midday. Third shift hit recurring accumulation and Cavanna 4 rail problems. Sollich 3 ran out caramel at 01:14, caustic cleaned, and restarted at 04:21 but saw cooking times jump 10-16 minutes post-clean. Sollich 4 is recleaning after XR80 failed ACP testing — ATP now passed.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 had a quiet 24 hours. FFS cleared a bag-seal jam in 9 minutes at 08:31. ML2 and ML3 completed level 2 cleanings and temper flushes overnight with no issues. All lines running on schedule.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 Truffle cleared an accidental E-stop in 20 minutes and a belt bearing failure in under 2 hours, but most of the line failed ATP at 07:08 — reclean underway. ML4 startup hit mold jams at the scraper starting at 20:02, chain sync is off by -280, still jamming at window close. MF Matrix battled weight and throughput issues all day, funnel clogged 4 times, max speed dropped to 27 ppm.

resolved.title: Sollich 4 ATP failures on covers 9-11
resolved.summary: ATP swabs on covers 9-11 and one area failed at 23:09, required re-rinse and sanitization.
resolved.resolution: Re-rinse completed, all areas passed ATP at 23:26 and final sanitization at 05:55 — "all areas cleaned passed the ATP tests" (Ebrima Dibba).

resolved.title: Sollich 3 ran out caramel on depositor
resolved.summary: Depositor ran out caramel at 01:14, crew initiated caustic clean.
resolved.resolution: Caustic clean started at 01:34, line back to run at 04:21 — "line is back to run" (Luis Falcon).

resolved.title: FFS bags coming out open
resolved.summary: Bags opened during sealing at 08:31, cleared and line running by 08:40.

resolved.title: Truffle line belt motor bearing seized
resolved.summary: Belt motor bearing seized at 17:46, maintenance sourced replacement from L1 and installed.
resolved.resolution: Bearing replaced, temper checked good at 19:37, line started — "temper is good we are starting up" (Tyson Fausett).

resolved.title: Truffle line E-stop accidentally pressed
resolved.summary: Operator pressed E-stop at 09:29, required three temper readings per restart protocol before resuming.
resolved.resolution: Third temper reading good at 09:49, line restarted — "restarted the line" (Grey Boscan).

resolved.title: ML4 mold jam at cooling cabinet 2
resolved.summary: Mold jam at cooling cabinet 2 upper level at 10:32, operators and Alex clearing.
resolved.resolution: Jam fixed at 11:27, 400 molds with plain bars entering cooling cabinet 3 — "mold jam is fixed" (Itzel Chavez).

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 Cavanna 4 turning chocolates, causing doubles and accumulation
needs_attention.summary: Chocolates turning in Cavanna 4 rails at 01:03, massive doubles and 50+ bins accumulation, paused multiple times through third shift.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance troubleshooting at 01:03, accumulation requiring 40-minute pause at 06:25, issue ongoing at window close.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 3 cooking time increased 10-16 minutes after caustic clean
needs_attention.summary: After caustic clean, C2 cooking time increased from 31 to 47 minutes over 3 batches, C1 from 31 to 41 minutes.
needs_attention.status: Increase observed at 06:25, Jody Howse and Curt Willis notified, no root cause or corrective action posted.

needs_attention.title: ML4 mold jams at scraper, chain out of sync
needs_attention.summary: Mold jams recurring near scraper starting at 20:02, missing piece from last week contributing, drive chain diff at -280.
needs_attention.status: Still getting jams at 20:59, chain sync issue identified, no resolution by window close.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix weight issues and low throughput
needs_attention.summary: Weight problems starting at 08:00, funnel clogged 4 times during day shift, running 43 ppm but only 28-35 coming out, recipe changes made.
needs_attention.status: Max speed 27 ppm after recipe changes at 16:15, cleaning completed and ATP passed overnight, but throughput degraded from target.

needs_attention.title: Truffle line failed ATP after level 2 cleaning
needs_attention.summary: Most sections of truffle line failed ATP at 07:08, Kevin working on list for Raoul to reclean.
needs_attention.status: Raoul working plan to bring employees in to reclean failed sections as of 07:08.

needs_attention.title: Truffle temper unit magnet vibrating loose, bolt damaged
needs_attention.summary: Magnet on temper unit buffer tank vibrating and moving, bolt not holding well, screen missing stopper, backup screen has broken bolt mount.
needs_attention.status: Preston Elmer and Preston Tregaskis discussed at 16:07, have plans to address, no timeline given.
